commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8f7385871bd7446b8fb7ad847cb953c6cb07ffd5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `skill.used` diagnostic event for skill-file reads and skill command tool dispatch, exports it through Prometheus and OTEL, and updates docs, changelog, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of PR head shows the second inline wrapper, params-derived command matching, and prompt-snapshot lookup. The requested telemetry itself is a feature, not a bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review for the new diagnostics contract; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: feat(diagnostics): add skill usage telemetry
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: tool execution telemetry existed, but skill usage was not exported as a first-class diagnostics signal.
- Why it matters: operators could see `read`/`exec` tool calls, but could not build Prometheus/Grafana or OTEL dashboards showing which skills were actually used.
- What changed: added trusted `skill.used` diagnostics when a run reads a known `SKILL.md` or completes a command-dispatched skill tool, then exported it via `diagnostics-otel` and `diagnostics-prometheus`.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no skill loading, skill selection, command execution, permissions, auth, or model behavior changed.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [x] Gateway / orchestration
- [x] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [x] Integrations
- [x] API / contracts
- [ ] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: skill usage is now visible as diagnostics telemetry instead of only indirect tool calls.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw repo on macOS, Node 22.22.2.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/agents/pi-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-prometheus/src/service.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts`
- Evidence after fix: targeted tests passed: 3 Vitest shards, 3 files, 91 tests total.
- Observed result after fix: core emits `skill.used`; Prometheus renders `openclaw_skill_used_total`; OTEL records `openclaw.skill.used` counter/span.
- What was not tested: live Gateway + Grafana dashboard scrape.
- Before evidence: N/A; this is a feature addition, not a regression fix.

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: N/A.
- Missing detection / guardrail: N/A.
- Contributing context (if known): tool telemetry counted tool calls, but skills are prompt/read based and did not previously have their own diagnostic event.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

N/A for bug regression.

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [ ] Unit test
  - [x] Seam / integration test
  - [x] End-to-end test
  - [ ] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file: `src/agents/pi-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts`, `extensions/diagnostics-prometheus/src/service.test.ts`, `extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts`
- Scenario the test should lock in: known skill file reads and command-dispatched skill tools emit/export bounded skill telemetry.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: it covers the core diagnostic emission point and both telemetry exporters.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any): newly added targeted tests.
- If no new test is added, why not: N/A.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

Adds new diagnostics output:

- Prometheus: `openclaw_skill_used_total{activation,agent,skill,source}`
- OTEL: `openclaw.skill.used` counter and `openclaw.skill.used` span

No config changes required.

## Diagram (if applicable)

```text
Before:
agent reads SKILL.md -> read tool telemetry only -> no skill usage dashboard signal

After:
agent reads SKILL.md -> skill.used diagnostic -> OTEL/Prometheus export -> dashboardable skill usage
target.author: gauravprasadgp

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
